name: L&T EWCR RFI (Orange Gate Tunnel)
notes: Single-page Request for Inspection form for the Orange Gate / EWCR tunnel project. Format No: LT/OG/Q/F01/A3. Has a multi-select 'Detail Area to be Inspected' grid, work details, a 4-column signature table (Execution/QA-QC/Safety/PMC), Approved/Approved with Comments/Not Approved status, and L&T + PMC rep blocks.
